video.title: Explaining cybersecurity based on the seniorshelpingseniors.com
video.subtitle: Pag eksplekar hit Seguridad ha Cyber base ha seniorshelpingseniors.com

description.title: What is Cybersecurity?
description.english: Cybersecurity is the way of protecting our information, money, and devices on the internet — such as cellphones, computers, and the apps we use.
description.waray: An Cybersecurity amo an paagi hin panalipod han aton impormasyon, kwarta, ngan mga gamit ha internet — sugad han cellphone, computer, ngan apps nga aton ginagamit.

keypoint.english: We can protect ourselves. Be alert. Be strong even in the digital world.
keypoint.waray: Maproteheran an aton kalugaringon. Maging alerto. Maging marig-on bisan ha digital nga kalibutan.

tips.english: 1. Use a strong password. Example: PedroGuiuan1950!
2. Do not give your password, OTP, or GCash PIN. Even if they claim to be from the bank, never give it.
tips.waray: Ayaw paghatag han imo password, OTP, o GCash PIN. Bisan pa kun masiring nga taga-bangko hira, ayaw gud paghatag.

tips.english: 3. Do not click links from people you don’t know. Even if it says “claim your prize,” don’t click.
tips.waray: Ayaw pag-click hin link tikang ha di mo kilala. Bisan pa may sugo nga 'claim your prize', ayaw gad.

tips.english: 4. Don’t quickly believe Facebook messages. If there’s a nonsense video or link sent to you, don’t open it.
tips.waray: Ayaw pagbatun dayon ha mga mensahe ha Facebook. Kun may waray pulos nga video o link nga igpapasa, ayaw pag-open o pindut.

tips.english: 5. Always log out when you finish using, especially on public computers or others’ phones.
tips.waray: Pirme mag-log out kun matapos ka gamit, labina kun gamit mo an public computer o cellphone han iba.
